details.productUrlName: Claire DLoon Joy Sculptor Galaxy Foil

customAttributes.description:
When Claire D'Loon, Joy Sculptor enters the battlefield, for the rest of the game, tokens you own become cards that are still tokens. (They continue to exist after they leave the battlefield.)
1WU, T: You may put a token from your graveyard or hand onto the battlefield.
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item with an estimated shipping date of 10/7/2022. Please keep in mind card details, including rarity and card name, may change up until release date as information is updated.
customAttributes.flavorText: She'll sculpt goblins, saprolings, Marit Lage... though that one takes a lot of balloons.
